message:
test(search-core): add 28 tests for search results and explain system

Expand results.rs from 12 to 40 tests covering:
- ExplainStage: canonical_order(), serde roundtrip, ordering
- ExplainReasonCode: summary() non-empty for all 10 variants,
  serde roundtrip with snake_case
- ExplainVerbosity: Default is Standard, serde roundtrip
- ExplainComposerConfig: default values
- compose_hit_explanation: all stages missing, multiple stages
  with weighted scores, reason_codes BTreeSet dedup
- compose_stage: Standard strips detail, Detailed preserves
  detail, max_factors=0 hides all with correct truncated count,
  custom vs default summary
- factor_sort_cmp: abs contribution descending, tiebreak by
  code then key
- redact_hit_explanation: direct call zeroes scores/factors/sets
  redacted flag
- redact_report_for_docs: non-matching docs preserved
- compose_explain_report: metadata (mode, candidates, taxonomy,
  stage_order, verbosity, phase_timings)
- ScoreFactor: serde roundtrip, detail=None skipped
- HitExplanation/StageExplanation: serde roundtrips
- SearchResults: empty with all mode variants
- SearchHit: no snippet/highlights, multiple highlights

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
